texto: It seems impossible to wheedle his way out of his impending death. No one has before him. But just as a young person feels invincible, he cannot bring himself to accept the looming train as he stands upon the tracks feeling the deep rumbling of the behemoth barreling straight toward him.
explicacao: Citação de M. Starks sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “It seems impossible to wheedle his way out of his impending death. No one has before him. But jus…” articula autoestima, acceptance, death-and-dying em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como luto e dia-chuvoso.

frase_original: It seems impossible to wheedle his way out of his impending death. No one has before him. But just as a young person feels invincible, he cannot bring himself to accept the looming train as he stands upon the tracks feeling the deep rumbling of the behemoth barreling straight toward him.

texto: Gran runs her fingers through my hair, smiling down at me. I'm to weak to reach up and trace her laugh lines, but I trace them with my eyes, thinking of all the years that have gone by between Lucy and I with Gran. All of the memories held in those lines, smiles and laughs. I am touched by the way our generations pass, one to the other, our genes the same yet slightly altered, carrying with us all of those memories.
explicacao: Citação de M. Starks sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Gran runs her fingers through my hair, smiling down at me. I'm to weak to reach up and trace her …” articula reflexao, family, generations em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como generations e laugh-lines.
